content.markdown:
# Button

## Terminology for button labeling

Use the term pairs consistently.

## Stepper buttons

Use verb + object for the creation button.

content.rule: Use 'Cancel' to back out when information has been entered. Use 'Close' for read-only messages.
Use 'Create' for brand-new objects. Use 'Add' for inserting existing objects.

sections.heading: Stepper buttons
content: Use verb + object for the creation button. Verb should usually be 'Create'.
